falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes 10% below the 200-day moving average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant breakdown below key long-term support would invalidate the HOLD signal and suggest a bearish trend reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% of the 20-day average on a single day with a bearish candlestick pattern
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extreme volume combined with a reversal pattern would indicate a blowoff top, contradicting the current HOLD/UNKNOWN verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 60% in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the historical pattern would invalidate the basis for the current UNKNOWN verdict

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
